What We Offer
Detailing Packages

Every service delivered to your location. Cars, motorcycles & boats. Fully equipped mobile unit. No drop-offs. No waiting.

Tier I
Standard Wash
The everyday standard. Keeps your car sharp.
  • Hand wash & hand dry
  • Wheel & tire cleaning
  • Tire dressing
  • Interior vacuum
  • Dashboard & console wipe-down
  • Interior & exterior glass
  • Door jamb wipe
Per car$100
3+ cars: $75 each
Most Popular
Tier II
Signature Detail
Deeper clean with real paint protection.
  • Everything in Standard Wash
  • Clay bar decontamination
  • Hand wax & paint sealant
  • Leather & vinyl conditioning
  • Odor elimination treatment
  • Engine bay wipe-down
  • Streak-free window polish
Per car$175
3+ cars: $140 each
Tier III
Golden Standard
The full showroom experience. Our absolute best.
  • Everything in Signature Detail
  • Multi-stage machine polish
  • Iron & paint decontamination
  • Ceramic coating prep
  • Steam interior cleaning
  • Seat shampoo & extraction
  • Before & after photo documentation
Per car$275
3+ cars: $225 each
Specialty
Moto & Marine
We detail more than just cars — motorcycles and boats get the same Golden Standard treatment.
  • Motorcycle full detail & polish
  • Chrome & metal restoration
  • Boat hull wash & oxidation removal
  • Marine interior cleaning
  • Teak & vinyl conditioning
  • Gel coat polish & protection
  • Before & after photo documentation
Starting from $150

Who We Are
Built on One Standard

GS Detail was founded by John Edinger and Luis Silverio on a simple principle: every vehicle deserves showroom-level care, delivered right to your door.

As South Florida's premier mobile detailing team, we bring a fully equipped unit to your home, office, or dealership — no drop-offs, no waiting rooms, no hassle. Serving Miami-Dade, Broward, and Palm Beach Counties.

Whatever you drive — or ride, or sail — we raise it to the Golden Standard.

★
Uncompromising Quality
Professional-grade products and proven techniques — no shortcuts, no exceptions.
📍
100% Mobile — We Come to You
Self-contained mobile unit covering all of South Florida.
💰
Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
Every quote is clear upfront. No hidden fees, no mid-job upsells. Ever.
